reviews.comment:
Cuando me voy de vacaciones a Córdoba voy a Tortugas y entro al automóvil club para cargar combustible y tomar unos buenos mates.

reviews.comment:
Siempre paramos a comer y pasear a nuestra mascota, el lugar está muy lindo y don muy atentos.

(Translated by Google)
We always stop by to eat and walk our pet; the place is very nice and the staff are very attentive.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Years go by and the raw meat and cheese sandwich on bread remains an excellent option to break up the trip.

reviews.comment:
Tenes que entrar 2 km. Pero si venis viajando desde lejos, vas a encontrar un lindo lugar para descansar entre la arbolada tranquilidad del lugar, con lo básico como para continuar tranquilo.

(Translated by Google)
You have to enter 2 km. But if you're traveling from far away, you'll find a lovely place to rest among the tranquility of the wooded area, with the basics to keep you going.

reviews.comment:
Un buen lugar para hacer una pequeña parada pero muy mala la higiene de los baños de mujeres.

(Translated by Google)
A good place for a quick stop, but the women's restrooms are very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVeWI3X193RRAB

reviews.comment:
Mi unica recomendacion es que pongan una compu lector de codigos de barra en el minimercado, tardan muuuucho en cobrar, tienen q mirar la lista por todo y hacen las cuentas a mano, si se paga con debito van a otro lado.....

(Translated by Google)
My only recommendation is that they install a barcode scanner in the minimarket. They take forever to check out, they have to look at the list for everything and do the calculations by hand, and if you pay by debit card, they have to go somewhere else...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVN09lVHpnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para parar a mitad de viaje entre Córdoba y buenos aires. Gran espacio al aire libre, muy buena atención. Nafta YPF de buena calidad

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop halfway between Córdoba and Buenos Aires. Large outdoor area, excellent service. Good quality YPF gasoline.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVN1BtZHhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tiene una zona de descanso muy linda para tomar algo y parar a comer cuando hay que hacer un alto en el camino.

(Translated by Google)
It has a very nice rest area to have a drink and stop for a meal when you need to take a break along the way.
